# PAIR_LIST.md
# Living document tracking which coins are active, blacklisted, or manually reviewed.
# Updated: June 27, 2026
#
# HOW TO USE:
#   - ACTIVE PAIRS: coins currently being traded by the bot (auto-generated by filters)
#   - MANUAL SAFELIST: coins you want to force-include regardless of filters
#   - BLACKLIST: coins excluded and why
#   - WATCHLIST: coins to investigate before deciding to add or block
#
# To update the active pair list, run:
#   docker compose run --rm freqtrade test-pairlist --config user_data/config.json
#
# To apply blacklist changes, edit config.json pair_blacklist, then restart:
#   docker compose restart
#
# Note: MANUAL SAFELIST is informational only — to actually force a pair into
# the bot, add it to pair_whitelist in config.json AND switch pairlists to
# StaticPairList. With VolumePairList, the dynamic filters always apply.

---

## MANUAL SAFELIST (force-include regardless of filters)

Coins you have manually reviewed and want to always trade even if they temporarily
fail a filter (e.g. low volume day, or slight age restriction).
To actually activate these, add to pair_whitelist in config.json.

| Pair | Reason to include | Added by | Date |
|---|---|---|---|
| *(empty — add coins here)* | | | |

## FILTER SETTINGS REFERENCE

Current settings that determine what gets through:

| Filter | Setting | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| VolumePairList | Top 40, min $1M daily USDT | Baseline liquidity requirement |
| AgeFilter | 30+ days listed | Excludes newly launched tokens |
| RangeStabilityFilter | 1%–70% price change over 10 days | Excludes dead coins and extreme pumps |
| PrecisionFilter | Auto | Excludes bad tick sizes |
| PriceFilter | Min 1% price move possible | Excludes sub-cent dust coins |
| SpreadFilter | Max 0.5% bid/ask spread | Excludes illiquid pairs |

**To check what the current pairlist resolves to:**
```bash
docker compose run --rm freqtrade test-pairlist --config user_data/config.json
```

**Last verified:** June 27, 2026 — 33 active pairs
